news.title:
Agrochemical stocks, including NFL, GSFC, GNFC, and Chambal Fertilisers, fell up to 5% due to West Asia tensions.
Supply chain disruptions, high input costs, and weather concerns impacted fertiliser industry outlook.
news.summary:
Agrochemical stocks, including NFL, GSFC, GNFC, and Chambal Fertilisers, fell up to 5% due to West Asia tensions.
Supply chain disruptions, high input costs, and weather concerns impacted fertiliser industry outlook.

news.title:
Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals Ltd received an ESG rating of 64.8 from SES ESG Research.
The company clarified it did not engage SES ESG for this evaluation, based on public info.
news.summary:
Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals Ltd received an ESG rating of 64.8 from SES ESG Research.
The company clarified it did not engage SES ESG for this evaluation, based on public info.

news.title:
The Uttar Pradesh government has banned sales of non-subsidized fertilizers by urea manufacturers, impacting investor sentiment and nutrient efficiency.
Key fertilizer firms like National Fertilizers, Coromandel International, and Chambal Fertilisers face challenges, with UP's market for non-subsidized fertilizers being relatively small.
news.summary:
The Uttar Pradesh government has banned sales of non-subsidized fertilizers by urea manufacturers, impacting investor sentiment and nutrient efficiency.
Key fertilizer firms like National Fertilizers, Coromandel International, and Chambal Fertilisers face challenges, with UP's market for non-subsidized fertilizers being relatively small.

news.title:
India's green hydrogen push targets 5 MMT by 2030, leveraging Rs 8T investments via National Green Hydrogen Mission with policy support and incentives.
Stocks like L&T, Indian Oil, JSW Energy, NTPC, and GSFC anchor the ecosystem, spanning infrastructure, production, and end-use, with gradual progress expected.
news.summary:
India's green hydrogen push targets 5 MMT by 2030, leveraging Rs 8T investments via National Green Hydrogen Mission with policy support and incentives.
Stocks like L&T, Indian Oil, JSW Energy, NTPC, and GSFC anchor the ecosystem, spanning infrastructure, production, and end-use, with gradual progress expected.

news.title:
GSFC's quality grade downgraded to Average, Mojo Score now at 40.
Sell rating reflects concerns on returns, growth, and capital efficiency.
news.summary:
GSFC's quality grade downgraded to Average, Mojo Score now at 40.
Sell rating reflects concerns on returns, growth, and capital efficiency.

news.title:
GSFC announced audio recording link of investor call on Q3 FY25 results.
The recording is available on GSFC's website for stakeholder reference.
news.summary:
GSFC announced audio recording link of investor call on Q3 FY25 results.
The recording is available on GSFC's website for stakeholder reference.

news.title: GSFC reported strong Q3 performance in revenue, profit, and margins.
news.summary: GSFC reported strong Q3 performance in revenue, profit, and margins.

news.title:
GSFC's Q3 FY26 sales rose 5%, PBT up 18%, PAT up 32% YoY.
Highest fertilizer production in 5 years; new sulphuric acid plant commissioned.
news.summary:
GSFC's Q3 FY26 sales rose 5%, PBT up 18%, PAT up 32% YoY.
Highest fertilizer production in 5 years; new sulphuric acid plant commissioned.

news.title:
Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals Q3 net profit rose to ₹1.6B from ₹1.3B YoY.
Q3 revenue increased to ₹29.4B compared to ₹28B in the same period last year.
news.summary:
Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals Q3 net profit rose to ₹1.6B from ₹1.3B YoY.
Q3 revenue increased to ₹29.4B compared to ₹28B in the same period last year.

news.title:
GSFC's net profit for Q3 rose 18.1% to ₹158 crore, revenue grew 4.5% to ₹2,941 crore.
EBITDA increased 11.8% to ₹177.4 crore, with margins improving to 6% from 5.6% YoY.
news.summary:
GSFC's net profit for Q3 rose 18.1% to ₹158 crore, revenue grew 4.5% to ₹2,941 crore.
EBITDA increased 11.8% to ₹177.4 crore, with margins improving to 6% from 5.6% YoY.

news.title:
Gujarat State Fertilizers starts commercial operations at Vadodara plant.
The move aims to increase production and meet agricultural sector demand.
news.summary:
Gujarat State Fertilizers starts commercial operations at Vadodara plant.
The move aims to increase production and meet agricultural sector demand.

news.title:
Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals Ltd begins commercial production of Sulphuric Acid.
The plant at Fertilizernagar, Vadodara, has a daily capacity of 600 MTPD.
news.summary:
Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals Ltd begins commercial production of Sulphuric Acid.
The plant at Fertilizernagar, Vadodara, has a daily capacity of 600 MTPD.

news.title:
Dr. Rajender Kumar, 2004 batch IAS officer, appointed MD of Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals Ltd.
Appointment effective Jan 2026, approved by Nomination & Remuneration Committee; currently Gujarat's Transport Commissioner.
news.summary:
Dr. Rajender Kumar, 2004 batch IAS officer, appointed MD of Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals Ltd.
Appointment effective Jan 2026, approved by Nomination & Remuneration Committee; currently Gujarat's Transport Commissioner.

news.title:
India starts anti-dumping probe on nylon-6 chip imports from China, Russia.
Domestic manufacturers claim cheap imports hurt local industry, says commerce ministry.
news.summary:
India starts anti-dumping probe on nylon-6 chip imports from China, Russia.
Domestic manufacturers claim cheap imports hurt local industry, says commerce ministry.

news.title:
GSFC appoints Dr. Rajender Kumar as Managing Director effective 03 Jan 2026, replacing Mr. Sanjeev Kumar.
Mr. Sanjeev Kumar resigned as MD on 02 Jan 2026, completing his tenure and related responsibilities.
news.summary:
GSFC appoints Dr. Rajender Kumar as Managing Director effective 03 Jan 2026, replacing Mr. Sanjeev Kumar.
Mr. Sanjeev Kumar resigned as MD on 02 Jan 2026, completing his tenure and related responsibilities.

news.title:
Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals affirmed credit ratings by India Ratings.
Ratings for bank loans and commercial paper stand at IND AA Stable and IND A1.
news.summary:
Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals affirmed credit ratings by India Ratings.
Ratings for bank loans and commercial paper stand at IND AA Stable and IND A1.

news.title:
GSFC reports Q2FY26 revenue of ₹2,532Cr (+15% YoY) and EBITDA of ₹538Cr (+19% YoY).
GSFC to expand Caprolactam, Melamine capacity by 30% in FY27; ₹1,800Cr capex pipeline.
news.summary:
GSFC reports Q2FY26 revenue of ₹2,532Cr (+15% YoY) and EBITDA of ₹538Cr (+19% YoY).
GSFC to expand Caprolactam, Melamine capacity by 30% in FY27; ₹1,800Cr capex pipeline.

news.title:
GSFC Q2 sales rose 20% YoY to Rs 3140 cr; PAT up 6% YoY to Rs 320 cr.
Fertilizer revenue grew 21%; industrial products posted Rs 54 cr EBIT profit.
news.summary:
GSFC Q2 sales rose 20% YoY to Rs 3140 cr; PAT up 6% YoY to Rs 320 cr.
Fertilizer revenue grew 21%; industrial products posted Rs 54 cr EBIT profit.

news.title:
GSFC appoints IAS officer Manoj Kumar Das as Director and Chairman.
Leadership change aims to steer GSFC's future strategies effectively.
news.summary:
GSFC appoints IAS officer Manoj Kumar Das as Director and Chairman.
Leadership change aims to steer GSFC's future strategies effectively.

news.title:
GSFC received an ESG Rating of 56 from ESG Risk Assessments & Insights Ltd.
The rating report was independently prepared using public data, not commissioned by GSFC.
news.summary:
GSFC received an ESG Rating of 56 from ESG Risk Assessments & Insights Ltd.
The rating report was independently prepared using public data, not commissioned by GSFC.
